subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-10-13 ? in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God that not once did I rest in the bed of comfort. At the time of His ascension to the Abha Kingdom, His Holiness Christ had nearly sixty believers.
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد خدا را یکشب به بستر راحت استراحت ننمودم حضرت مسیح بعد از صعودش
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration
